articles.title: Changi Airport Terminal 2 to have new private terminal and amenities cluster in 2027
articles.content: The new terminal will feature a deluxe lounge, bar, private suites and bespoke dining. It will also include a versatile, high-end event space designed for larger entourages and private gatherings. Mr Ang Siew Min, CAG’s senior vice-president of airport operations development and airport operations services, said: “Some of today’s travellers seek more than just a comfortable place to...

articles.title: 2 arrested at MBS for allegedly cheating man into making multiple bank transfers
articles.content: Daniel said in his post that the incident happened at around 3.45am. They had allegedly cheated a male victim into making multiple bank transfers into a designated account. The duo were arrested following the man's report. No part of this story can be reproduced without the permission of AsiaOne.
